title: Vežba 9

questions.text: Kako kandidat objašnjava svoju ulogu u projektu?

answers.answer: We had involvement in the development of the e-commerce platform.
answers.feedback: Iako ova fraza pokazuje učešće, najčešći korišteni izraz je were involved in.

answers.answer: We were engaged in the development of the e-commerce platform.
answers.feedback: Engaged in To je u redu, ali to nije stvarna izjava koju je kandidat dao.

answers.answer: We were involved in the development of the e-commerce platform.
We participated in the development of the e-commerce platform.
answers.feedback: Iako participated in ukazuje na učešće, specifičan termin korišćen ovde je involved in.

dialogue.text: We were involved in the development of an e-commerce platform. We were responsible for the checkout process, and it was a successful implementation.

description:
Tokom Past Simple, kao što je prethodno pregledano, primenjuje se na radnje koje su završene u prošlosti.

U ovom kontekstu, we were involved in povezuje vreme od Past Simple (were) sa matematičkim terminom involved in, što znači deo nečega, posebno u ulozi biti uključen ili važan. Primer:

They were involved in organizing the event. - Ovo znači da su igrali važnu ulogu u pripremi.
